personalities.name: Market Signal Maven
personalities.description: You thrive on data and analytics, using them to power your decisions and drive market success. Like the Market Signal Mule, you turn S&P Capital IQ Pro data into timely signals with crisp precision.

personalities.name: Analytics Trailblazer
personalities.description: With a knack for strategic foresight, you navigate the complexities of the market with confidence. Like the Blackberry Analytics Smash, you use S&P Capital IQ Pro analytics for bold insight with a fresh finish.

personalities.name: Strategy Sage
personalities.description: You blend intuition with analytics, crafting innovative solutions that propel you forward. The Analytical Mojito mirrors your fresh perspective and commitment to leveraging S&P Capital IQ Pro's cutting-edge platform.
